_meta.name: Layer 2 Semantic Memory — Golden Evaluation Set
_meta.purpose: Hand-curated cache lookup scenarios with ground-truth labels. Each case is a (record, lookup) pair plus the expected verdict (hit/miss + reasoning).

label_schema.category: paraphrase | negation | unrelated | escalated | low_quality | stale | pii_bearing | tenant_isolation | entity_novelty | model_version
label_schema.record: dict with query / model_id / quality_score / escalated / intent / domain / complexity_band
label_schema.lookup: string — the query to look up
label_schema.expected_guard_rejected: string | null — substring expected in reasoning if missing

record.query: What is Python?

cases.lookup: What is the Python programming language?
cases.rationale: Near-identical intent, just slightly more verbose phrasing

record.query: How do I sort a list in Python?

cases.lookup: What's the python way to sort a list?
cases.rationale: Semantically equivalent sort-a-list query

record.query: Explain machine learning

cases.lookup: What is machine learning?
cases.rationale: Same factual lookup, different verbs

record.query: How do I install Docker?

cases.lookup: How do I uninstall Docker?
cases.rationale: Install/uninstall flip the action — must not cache-hit

record.query: Enable telemetry for the app

cases.lookup: Disable telemetry for the app
cases.rationale: Enable vs disable — opposite intents

record.query: How do I run tests with coverage?

cases.lookup: How do I run tests without coverage?
cases.rationale: with vs without — guard should catch

record.query: What is Python?

cases.lookup: What is Java?
cases.rationale: Different programming languages — semantic similarity below threshold

record.query: Capital of France

cases.lookup: Population of Germany
cases.rationale: Different country, different question type

record.query: Implement a distributed consensus algorithm in Go

cases.lookup: Implement a distributed consensus algorithm in Go
cases.rationale: Even on exact match, escalated entries must never be served from cache

record.query: Explain quantum entanglement

cases.lookup: Explain quantum entanglement
cases.rationale: quality_score below medium tier threshold

record.query: How do I use Kubernetes for orchestration?

cases.lookup: How do I use Nomad and Consul and Vault for orchestration?
cases.rationale: Different proper nouns — entity novelty guard should reject

record.query: Send an email to alice@example.com about the meeting

cases.lookup: Send an email to bob@other.com about the meeting
cases.rationale: After PII scrubbing both queries normalize to '<EMAIL>' → cache should hit

record.query: Show users from the database

cases.lookup: Show users from the database
cases.rationale: Tenant scoping — tenant_A entry must not be visible to tenant_B

record.query: Hi

cases.lookup: Hi, can you help me debug this 200-line Python script that uses recursion to solve the n-queens problem and has some really weird off-by-one error in the backtracking step?
cases.rationale: 30× length difference — context-length guard must reject

record.query: Summarize this article

cases.lookup: Summarize this article
cases.rationale: Model rev changed — stale routing decision

record.query: Write a function to reverse a string

cases.lookup: Write a function to reverse a string
cases.rationale: Same lexical query but classifier says different intent now

record.query: What are the symptoms of type 2 diabetes?

cases.lookup: What are the signs of type 2 diabetes?
cases.rationale: Symptoms vs signs are interchangeable in medical context

record.query: Should I take ibuprofen for my headache?

cases.lookup: Should I avoid ibuprofen for my headache?
cases.rationale: Take vs avoid — opposite recommendations, must NOT cache-hit

record.query: How do I lower my blood pressure naturally?

cases.lookup: How do I raise my blood pressure naturally?
cases.rationale: Lower vs raise — opposite medical advice

record.query: What does Metformin do?

cases.lookup: What does Lisinopril do?
cases.rationale: Different medications — drug-name entity must differentiate

record.query: What are my rights as a tenant?

cases.lookup: What rights do I have as a renter?
cases.rationale: Tenant and renter are synonymous in this legal context

record.query: How do I file a small claims lawsuit?

cases.lookup: How do I avoid a small claims lawsuit?
cases.rationale: File vs avoid — completely opposite legal goals

record.query: Tenant rights under California law

cases.lookup: Tenant rights under Texas law
cases.rationale: Jurisdiction differs — laws are state-specific

record.query: How do I invest in stocks for beginners?

cases.lookup: How do I start investing in stocks as a beginner?
cases.rationale: Beginner stock-investing question, reordered phrasing

record.query: How do I file my taxes early?

cases.lookup: How do I avoid filing my taxes?
cases.rationale: File vs avoid filing — opposite intent (and legally dicey)

record.query: How do I make pasta carbonara?

cases.lookup: Recipe for pasta carbonara
cases.rationale: Recipe vs how-to-make are the same culinary request

record.query: How do I cook rice with a rice cooker?

cases.lookup: How do I cook rice without a rice cooker?
cases.rationale: With vs without — different cooking method needed

record.query: What's the best exercise routine to lose weight?

cases.lookup: What's the best exercise routine to gain weight?
cases.rationale: Lose vs gain weight — opposite goals, different routines

record.query: Best places to visit in Japan in spring

cases.lookup: Best places to visit in South Korea in spring
cases.rationale: Different country — different destinations entirely

record.query: How do I get a tourist visa for Japan?

cases.lookup: What's the process to get a Japan tourist visa?
cases.rationale: Same visa application question phrased differently

record.query: Write a short poem about autumn

cases.lookup: Compose a brief poem about fall
cases.rationale: Write/compose, short/brief, autumn/fall — same creative request

record.query: Suggest names for my new puppy

cases.lookup: Suggest names for my new kitten
cases.rationale: Same TYPE of question (pet naming). Layer 2 caches routing decisions, not answers — the same model can handle puppy- and kitten-naming. The LLM differentiates in its response. Known limit: lowercase species nouns aren't differentiated by Model2Vec; document as acceptable for routing purposes.

record.query: Explain photosynthesis to a 10-year-old

cases.lookup: Explain photosynthesis simply for a child
cases.rationale: Child-friendly explanation request, paraphrased

record.query: How do I save my marriage?

cases.lookup: How do I get a divorce?
cases.rationale: Save vs divorce — opposite relationship outcomes

record.query: Why does my dog keep barking at night?

cases.lookup: What causes my dog to bark all night?
cases.rationale: Same dog-barking question reworded

record.query: What are the symptoms of diabetes?

cases.lookup: How do I refinance my mortgage?
cases.rationale: Completely different domains — must not match
